processSection.title: How Every Project Works
processSection.subtitle: Four steps. No surprises. You know what's happening at every stage.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We learn your business, your audience, and what makes you different. No templates. Just a plan built for your specific situation.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.description: Every video gets mapped to a stage in your sales process. It has a purpose, a place in your funnel, and a number to hit.

steps.title: Production
steps.description: Professional crew, cinema-grade gear, and attention to every detail. We handle the set. You focus on being yourself on camera.

steps.title: Optimization
steps.description: After launch, we track performance and iterate. Better thumbnails, tighter hooks, stronger CTAs. Small improvements that compound.

workGallery.title: Our Work
workGallery.subtitle: Real projects. Real clients. Real results.

growth.title: Where video meets your sales process
growth.subtitle: Every service is built to plug into your pipeline and move a specific number.

services.title: Video Sales Systems
services.description: A full video library for your sales team. Objection handlers, case studies, demos, and email sequences. One system, not scattered files that sit unused.

services.title: Performance Video Campaigns
services.description: Campaigns built around one goal: more leads, demos, or closed deals. Creative, media buying consultation, and landing page strategy. Everything points to one number.

services.title: Sales Team Video Enablement
services.description: Give your reps video superpowers. Custom templates for outreach, follow-ups, and objection handling. Includes training, scripts, and a content library they'll actually use.

services.title: Growth Strategy Consulting
services.description: Not sure where video fits in your funnel? We audit your sales process, find the gaps, and tell you exactly what to create and when to deploy it.

services.title: Creative Problem Solving
services.description: Stuck on how to explain something complex? Need to stand out in a crowded market? We solve the hard creative problems, the ones where "make it pretty" isn't enough.

phases.label: See what's working and what isn't

services.name: Online Presence Audit
services.outcome: A clear picture of what your online presence is telling potential customers.
services.description: We look at your site, content, and competitors across 50+ data points. You get a prioritized roadmap of what to fix first.

services.name: Competitor Intelligence
services.outcome: Know what your competitors are doing and where they're vulnerable.
services.description: Analysis of 5-10 competitors covering SEO, content, ads, and conversion. You get the gaps they don't know they have.

services.name: Conversion Mapping
services.outcome: Find where visitors drop off and why they don't convert.
services.description: Heatmaps, session recordings, and funnel analysis. We map every leak and prioritize what to fix first.

services.name: Video Production
services.outcome: Videos that move deals forward, not just look good.
services.description: Scripts mapped to your sales process, 4K production, multi-platform delivery. Every frame earns its place.

services.name: Web Development
services.outcome: A fast site that says what you do and captures leads.
services.description: Conversion-first copy, custom responsive build, fast load times, and 30 days of post-launch analytics.

services.name: Content Coaching
services.outcome: Your team makes professional content every week, without hiring an agency.
services.description: In-house studio setup, hands-on training sessions, and repeatable templates. We give your team a playbook, then they're on their own.

services.name: CRM & Sales Systems
services.outcome: Your CRM closes deals instead of just storing contacts.
services.description: Setup matched to your sales process with automated follow-up sequences and pipeline dashboards.

services.name: Marketing Automation
services.outcome: Sequences that nurture leads based on real buyer behavior.
services.description: Email and SMS sequences triggered by what people actually do. Drip campaigns, re-engagement flows, and lead scoring.

services.name: Performance Dashboards
services.outcome: See what's working, what's not, and where to focus.
services.description: Custom dashboards connecting your site, CRM, ads, and content into one view. Metrics your team will actually use.

faq.title: Common
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before we start working together.

items.question: Where should we start?
items.answer: A quick call. We'll look at where you are, find the gaps, and tell you where to start. Most clients begin with an Audit. You need to know what's not working before you fix it.

items.question: Do we need all the services?
items.answer: No. Most clients start with one or two and add as they grow. The services are designed to work together, but each one stands alone. We'll recommend what actually moves the needle.

items.question: What does pricing look like?
items.answer: It depends on scope. An audit starts in the low four figures. Full production or CRM buildouts are higher. We'll give you a clear quote after our strategy call. No surprises, no hidden fees.

items.question: How fast will I see results?
items.answer: Sprint clients get a finished deliverable in two weeks. Monthly clients usually see real movement in 30-60 days.

items.question: Can you work with the tools I already have?
items.answer: Yes. We plug into whatever CRM, platform, or setup you're already running. If you have a team that could be making content, our coaching gets them producing on their own.

items.question: How do we get started?
items.answer: A 30-minute call. We listen to what you're working on and tell you what we'd focus on first. No deck, no pitch.
